title: US Stocks Slide as Nvidia, Tech Shares Drop on AI Worries
description: US stocks fell after better-than-expected results from chipmaker Nvidia Corp. failed to quell investors’ concerns about the sustainability of big-tech’s gains.
content: US stocks fell after better-than-expected results from chipmaker Nvidia Corp. failed to quell investors’ concerns about the sustainability of big-tech’s gains.
